examples: Kick the fire away. Now unchain the stranger.
But it may only be during a time of emotional inner turbulence that you can summon the strength to unchain yourself.
He could as easily unchain the words of life as he could open prison doors and unbolt iron gates to set His servants free.
The wireless web was supposed to unchain workers from their desktops and let handheld gadgets turn streams of invisible bits into stock portfolios, music and shopping sprees.
